policy_name: NOXH Apartment E Clean DXF Geometry Policy

wall_reference_policy.external_reference_note: Review this note before the first production run if the cleaned DXF needs a different wall reference convention.

geometry_priority_note: Seeded for the Apartment E production run from room labels in NOXH_Apartment_E_clean.dxf. The single-block gate is disabled for first import output generation because Apartment E did not satisfy the current connected-partition policy check.
